content: You don't say what you consider to be "the setting", but when you go to <Account Settings>, each account has a "Set as Default" button, and you will then see a star by the designated default account. Is this not what you see?
creator: rednoise

content:
Hi Lin,

Yes, that is what I see, however, when I set my desired email account as default, it always reverts back to the Gmail account when Thunderbird is restarted.
creator: lyle.beaman
